page_metadata.biotools__summary:
Gene finding in distinct metagenomic data complexities.

The GeneRFinder-Benchmark is a comprehensive benchmark data for gene prediction which is based on data of CAMI (Critical Assessment of Metagenome Interpretation) and contains labeled data from gene regions.
